visibleListings.title: 5 bedroom house for sale in Trasacco
visibleListings.description:
A Prestigious 5-Bedroom House for Sale & Rent at Trassaco Phase 2

Situated within the highly sought-after and well-planned enclave of Trassaco Phase 2, this exceptional five-bedroom residence presents a rare opportunity to own or lease a premium property in one of Accra’s most secure and prestigious residential neighborhoods. Designed to deliver comfort, privacy, and long-term value, this property is ideal for discerning homeowners, expatriates, diplomats, senior executives, and investors seeking a solid asset in a prime location.

Set on a generous land size of 100 feet by 80 feet, with a long and secure lease term of 89 years remaining, this house offers both immediate lifestyle benefits and enduring investment appeal. Whether you are considering outright ownership at USD 400,000 or exploring rental possibilities, this property stands out as a complete residential solution in an exclusive gated community.

Prime Location: Trassaco Phase 2

Trassaco Phase 2 is widely recognized as one of Accra’s most organized and upscale residential areas. The neighborhood is characterized by well-laid roads, controlled access points, and a serene environment that promotes peaceful living while remaining close to major urban conveniences.

Residents of Trassaco Phase 2 enjoy proximity to key areas such as East Legon, Airport Residential Area, Cantonments, and Spintex. Major shopping malls, international schools, healthcare facilities, restaurants, banks, and recreational centers are all within a short driving distance. This strategic location makes daily commuting effortless while maintaining the calm and exclusivity that defines luxury living.

Security is one of the strongest advantages of Trassaco Phase 2. The community benefits from organized security patrols, restricted access, and a reputation for safety, making it particularly attractive to families and high-profile residents.

Land Size and Property Layout

Occupying a substantial 100ft by 80ft plot, the property offers ample space for the main building, auxiliary structures, and outdoor areas. The land size allows for excellent spacing between structures, ensuring privacy, good airflow, and natural lighting throughout the property.

The layout of the house has been thoughtfully planned to balance functionality with comfort. Each section of the home flows seamlessly into the next, creating a sense of openness while still allowing for defined private and communal spaces. The generous land size also provides flexibility for future enhancements such as landscaping upgrades, a garden area, outdoor seating spaces, or recreational features.

Main House: Five Spacious Bedrooms

The centerpiece of the property is the five-bedroom main house, designed to accommodate large families or residents who appreciate extra space for guests, home offices, or private leisure areas.

Each bedroom is well-proportioned, offering sufficient space for large beds, wardrobes, and additional furniture without feeling cramped. The rooms are designed to be airy, with large windows that allow in abundant natural light and promote ventilation. This design approach ensures a comfortable indoor climate throughout the year.

The master bedroom stands out as a private retreat within the home. It is spacious enough to include a lounge or sitting area, providing a calm sanctuary for relaxation. The master suite is ideal for homeowners who value privacy, comfort, and a touch of luxury in their personal space.

The additional four bedrooms are equally functional and versatile. They can serve as children’s rooms, guest bedrooms, home offices, or hobby rooms, depending on the lifestyle needs of the occupants. This flexibility makes the house suitable for a wide range of residents, from large families to professionals who work from home.

Living and Dining Areas

The living areas of the house are designed to create a welcoming and elegant atmosphere. The main living room is spacious, making it ideal for hosting guests, family gatherings, or formal receptions. Its size allows for multiple seating arrangements, ensuring comfort without compromising on style.

The dining area is well-positioned, offering easy access to the kitchen while maintaining a sense of separation from the living room. This setup is perfect for both everyday family meals and formal dining occasions. The open yet defined layout enhances interaction while preserving order and organization within the home.

Natural lighting plays a key role in the ambiance of these spaces. Large windows and thoughtful positioning ensure that the living and dining areas remain bright and inviting throughout the day.

Kitchen and Utility Areas

The kitchen is designed with practicality and efficiency in mind. It offers ample space for storage, food preparation, and movement, making it suitable for both everyday cooking and larger meal preparations. The layout allows for easy installation of modern kitchen fittings and appliances, ensuring that residents can customize the space to their personal taste and standards.

Adjacent utility areas support the kitchen’s functionality, providing additional space for storage, laundry, and other household needs. These areas help keep the main living spaces organized and clutter-free, contributing to the overall neatness of the home.

Boys’ Quarters

A notable feature of this property is the dedicated Boys’ Quarters, which adds significant value and flexibility. The Boys’ Quarters can comfortably accommodate domestic staff, a driver, or guests who require independent living space.

This separate accommodation ensures privacy for both the main household and occupants of the Boys’ Quarters. It is especially beneficial for families that employ live-in staff or for homeowners who frequently host visitors and require additional sleeping arrangements without disturbing the main house.


Security Room

Security is a top priority in Trassaco Phase 2, and this property is well-equipped to meet those expectations. The inclusion of a dedicated security room enhances the overall safety and control of the residence.

The security room is strategically positioned to monitor access to the property, making it ideal for a security personnel or gatekeeper. This feature is particularly appealing to high-net-worth individuals, diplomats, and families who value an extra layer of security for peace of mind.

Outdoor Space and Compound

The compound surrounding the house is spacious and well-proportioned, providing ample room for parking multiple vehicles. The wide driveway ensures easy maneuverability, making it convenient for residents and guests alike.

Beyond parking, the outdoor space offers potential for landscaping and outdoor living enhancements. Homeowners can create a private garden, relaxation area, or children’s play space within the compound. The generous land size allows for creative use of outdoor areas while still maintaining privacy and security.

The compound also supports proper drainage and accessibility, contributing to the long-term durability and maintenance of the property.


Lease Term and Investment Value

With 89 years remaining on the lease, this property offers long-term security of tenure, which is a crucial consideration for buyers and investors alike. A lease of this length ensures that the property retains its value and remains a viable asset for generations.

At a sale price of USD 400,000, the property is competitively priced within the Trassaco Phase 2 market, especially considering its land size, number of bedrooms, Boys’ Quarters, security room, and prime location. The option for rental also makes it attractive to investors seeking steady rental income in a high-demand area.

Properties in Trassaco Phase 2 are known for their strong appreciation potential due to limited supply and consistent demand from expatriates and corporate clients. This makes the house not just a home, but a strategic investment.

Ideal for Multiple Uses

This five-bedroom house is suitable for a variety of uses, including:
	•	Private family residence
	•	Executive or expatriate accommodation
	•	Diplomatic or corporate housing
	•	Investment property for sale or rent
	•	Long-term asset holding in a premium neighborhood

Its layout, location, and additional facilities allow it to meet both residential and semi-corporate housing needs, depending on the preferences of the owner or tenant.


Lifestyle and Community

Living in Trassaco Phase 2 means enjoying a refined lifestyle within a well-organized community. Residents benefit from clean surroundings, reliable infrastructure, and a sense of exclusivity that sets the area apart from other residential zones in Accra.

The neighborhood encourages a calm and secure way of life, making it ideal for families with children as well as professionals seeking a peaceful retreat after a busy workday. The sense of community and order contributes significantly to the overall quality of living.


Summary

This five-bedroom house for sale and rent at Trassaco Phase 2 represents a unique opportunity to secure a premium property in one of Accra’s most desirable locations. With its five spacious bedrooms, Boys’ Quarters, security room, generous 100ft by 80ft land size, and an impressive 89 years remaining on the lease, the property offers exceptional value, comfort, and long-term potential.

Priced at USD 400,000 for sale, the house combines luxury, practicality, and investment strength in one complete package. Whether you are looking for a prestigious family home, executive residence, or a high-performing investment property, this Trassaco Phase 2 residence stands as a compelling choice.

For buyers and renters who value space, security, and location, this property delivers on all fronts and remains a standout offering in Accra’s luxury real estate market.


Reff. Korkor

School, Oyarifa Presby Primary School, St. James Anglican Basic School, Atlantic View International School, and Mount Sinai School, among several others.

                                                                Do you know that Ashaley Botwe got its name from the Ga language? This suburb is also known for its well-planned road network and streets that are named after famous Ghanaians. Moreso, the suburb is home to the Ashaley Botwe Military Cemetery, which is the final resting place of Ghanaian soldiers who died in various conflicts. It is also situated close to the Aburi Botanical Garden, a popular tourist attraction in Ghana. 
                                                            
                                                                Ashaley Botwe offers a variety of leisure and shopping activities for residents or visitors, with options ranging from playgrounds to plazas and supermarkets. At Ashaley Botwe, you will find Melcom Supermarket, Neighbourhood Supermarket, School Junction Plaza, Ashaley Botwe New Town-Down Community Park, and many other shopping and leisure options.
                                                            
                                                                Ashaley Botwe offers a variety of residential estates that cater to different housing needs and budgets. These estates offer well-planned communities with modern amenities and recreational facilities, making them attractive and convenient places to live. Some of these estates include Lakeside Estate and Adom Gates Estates. 
                                                            
                                                                Ashaley Botwe is a vibrant neighborhood where life bustles with a plethora of activities that span the entire day. The community's daily life is brimming with opportunities that cater to the diverse interests of its residents. A harmonious blend of work, play, and leisure activities creates a perfect equilibrium, making living in Ashaley Botwe a convenient and delightful experience. You can visit Starbites Food, Anis Food and Drink,  Panda Foods, Tasty Trails, King Darius Kitchen, LBC Restaurant, and many others to have a delectable meal. 
                                                            
                                                                While Ashaley Botwe is mainly known as a residential neighbourhood, its nightlife scene is generally more subdued in comparison to other parts of Accra. Nonetheless, there are still some choices available for those who want to engage in social activities after dark. Some of the options for nightlife in Ashaley Botwe include the Neighbourhood Pub, Bona Vista Bar, ParDees Nite Club, Elohorskky Bakes, Eatery & Pub, and several others.
                                                            
                                                                Ashaley Botwe has several schools that provide education to students at the primary and secondary levels, both in the public and private sectors. The schools offer a diverse range of educational programmes and curricula, which include the Ghanaian national curriculum, the British curriculum, and the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme. Some of the prominent schools in the area are New Hope School, Ashaley Botwe Sowa Din Cluster of Schools, St. Peter's Mission Schools, New Nation School, and Le Cadeau Montessori, among others.
